name: Signal: Sector One
description: Run a station in the Signal universe. Your Milady AI operates a refinery, yard, or works via the Signal station control API (cenetex/signal#317/#318).

SIGNAL_API_URL.description: Base URL for the Signal station control API. Defaults to https://signal.ratimics.com.

SIGNAL_AGENT_TOKEN.description: Bearer token minted via POST /agent/v1/bind. Allows the agent to operate a station without calling bind() from the plugin.

SIGNAL_API_URL.label: Signal API URL
SIGNAL_API_URL.help: Base URL for the Signal station control API.

SIGNAL_AGENT_TOKEN.label: Signal agent token
SIGNAL_AGENT_TOKEN.help: Bearer token for the bound station. Leave empty to mint one via BIND_STATION.

author: Cenetex Inc.
